panel.label: 🏠 Home
panel.name: tab_home
panel.text_editor:
Welcome to the S24 Engine Guide 🚀
This guide provides quick reference for advanced settings, defaults, and tuning tips for experienced users.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📖 GUIDE SECTIONS
• Common Settings - Most frequently adjusted values and defaults • S24 Console - Command-line interface to the viewer • Troubleshooting - Common issues and solutions • KVTweaks Tabs - Detailed breakdown of each tab
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ QUICK START
• Most settings take effect IMMEDIATELY - no restart needed • Shader changes require: RESETS → Purge Shader Cache → Restart • Hover over controls in KVTweaks for detailed tooltips • Use RESETS tab to restore defaults or purge caches
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📂 KVTWEAKS TAB OVERVIEW
CPU & Memory → Core count, thread pool, RAM/VRAM allocation RAM Cache → KVRAM texture buffer: budget, thresholds, eviction timing Rendering → LOD factors, draw distance, performance tuning Rendering Adv → Pool skip optimization, advanced pipeline controls SSR → Screen-space reflections (global, all surfaces) Water → Water appearance: metallic, roughness, color Shadows → Shadow quality, bias, throttling, resolution Reflections → Reflection probes: intensity, saturation, blur Lighting → Ambient, sun/moon controls Audio → Streaming engine, metadata, FMOD/OpenAL Movement → Smooth keyboard movement with acceleration curves Experimental → Selection beam styling and custom colors Resets → Cache purging, settings reset, factory reset
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 PRO TIP
Start with the Common Settings tab to see the most frequently adjusted values and their defaults. Then explore specific tabs for detailed controls.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTES
• These are EXPERT controls - for experienced users • Changes can impact stability and performance • TPV Policy compliant - all settings reset to Linden Lab defaults • Reflections/Water enhancements are opt-in and default to standard values • Movement smoothing is disabled by default

panel.label: ⚙️ Common Settings
panel.name: tab_common_settings
panel.text_editor:
Most frequently adjusted values and their defaults from settings.xml
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📊 CPU & THREADING (KVTweaks → CPU & Memory)
EmulateCoreCount Default: 0 (auto-detect) Range: 0-128 Notes: Override CPU core count detection. 0 = auto, 1-128 = manual override
KVdefault_cores Default: 8 Range: 1-128 Notes: Default cores allocated for texture decode operations
KVmin_cores Default: 4 Range: 1-128 Notes: Minimum cores for texture decode (prevents under-allocation)
KVmax_cores Default: 16 Range: 1-128 Notes: Maximum cores for texture decode (prevents over-allocation)
RenderCPUBasis Default: 3000 MHz Range: 1000-6000 MHz Notes: Reference CPU frequency for GPU bias calculation
RunMultipleThreads Default: true Notes: Keep background threads active during render
RenderGLMultiThreadedTextures Default: false Notes: Multi-threaded OpenGL texture loading (incompatible with Intel drivers)
RenderGLMultiThreadedMedia Default: false Notes: Multi-threaded OpenGL media playback (incompatible with Intel drivers)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💾 MEMORY MANAGEMENT (KVTweaks → CPU & Memory)
MaxHeapSize64 Default: 16 GB Range: 8-64 GB Notes: Maximum heap size for viewer process
RenderMaxVRAMBudget Default: 0 (auto-detect) Range: 0-32768 MB Notes: Maximum VRAM budget. 0 = automatic detection and management
RenderTextureVRAMDivisor Default: 1 (100%) Range: 1-10 Notes: VRAM divisor for texture budget. 1=100%, 2=50%, etc.
RenderMinFreeMainMemoryThreshold Default: 512 MB Range: 128-4096 MB Notes: Minimum free RAM threshold before viewer reduces memory usage
NonvisibleObjectsInMemoryTime Default: 300 frames Range: 0-1024 (0=no limit) Notes: How many frames to keep non-visible objects in memory
MainWorkTime Default: 1.00 ms Range: 0.01-3.00 ms Notes: Main loop time budget per frame
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎨 RENDERING CORE (KVTweaks → Rendering Core)
RenderVolumeLODFactor Default: 2.0 Range: 0.5-4.0 Notes: Mesh detail multiplier. Higher = more detail, more GPU load
RenderAvatarLODFactor Default: 1.0 Range: 0.5-2.0 Notes: Avatar mesh detail multiplier
RenderTerrainLODFactor Default: 2.0 Range: 0.5-4.0 Notes: Terrain mesh resolution multiplier
RenderTreeLODFactor Default: 1.0 Range: 0.5-2.0 Notes: Legacy Linden tree detail
RenderFarClip Default: 128 meters Range: 64-1024 meters Notes: Draw distance. Higher = more objects rendered, more load
RenderGeometryEmptyPoolSkip Default: 1 (enabled) Notes: S24 CPU optimization - skips rendering empty geometry pools Location: KVTweaks → Rendering Adv
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌊 WATER (KVTweaks → Water - S24 Exclusive System)
Water Preset System Location: KVTweaks → Water tab Features: Save/Load/Delete custom water shader profiles Notes: Complete S24 water control system with named presets
WaterMetallic Default: 1.0 (fully metallic mirror) Range: 0.0-1.0 Notes: S24 runtime control - LL hardcoded at 1.0, now fully adjustable
WaterRoughness Default: 0.0 (use environment blur) Range: 0.0-1.0 Notes: 0.0 = LL behavior, 0.01-1.0 = manual override for custom reflections
Water Wave Direction X/Y Default: Environment-controlled Notes: Wave direction vectors - adjustable in real-time
Water Wave Scale Default: Environment-controlled Notes: Wave size and detail control
Water Normal Map Strength Default: Environment-controlled Range: 0.0-2.0+ Notes: Bump map intensity for surface detail
Fresnel Scale & Offset Default: Preset-dependent Notes: Water transparency vs reflection balance at viewing angles
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📦 RAM CACHE (KVTweaks → RAM Cache)
KVRAMCacheEnabled Default: Disabled (false) Notes: Fast RAM buffer for GPU-evicted textures. Reduces disk I/O when textures are re-requested. Passive equilibrium system with user-controlled budget.
KVRAMCacheRAMBudgetMB Default: 2048 MB Range: 256-4096 MB (in 256 MB steps) Notes: RAM cache size for texture buffer. Higher values = more texture cache hits before disk fetch. Monitor system RAM usage when increasing.
KVRAMCacheSoftThreshold Default: 0.75 (75%) Range: 0.0-1.0 Notes: Begin gentle RAM-to-Disk eviction at this buffer usage level. Passive cleanup.
KVRAMCacheHardThreshold Default: 0.90 (90%) Range: 0.0-1.0 Notes: Aggressive RAM-to-Disk eviction at this usage (emergency mode). Prevents overflow.
KVRAMCacheGracePeriodSec Default: 10.0 seconds Range: 0.1-30.0 seconds (0.1 second steps) Notes: Eviction interval. Lower = more aggressive cleanup, higher = less churn.
KVRAMCacheMinDeckSize Default: 100 textures Range: 100-10000 textures (100 steps) Notes: Minimum texture deck size. Higher = more cache hits before rotation/eviction.
KVRAMCacheDebugLogging Default: Disabled (false) Notes: Enable verbose logging (evictions, queries, pressure). Use for diagnostics.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌑 SHADOWS (KVTweaks → Shadows)
RenderShadowResolutionScale Default: 3.0 Notes: S24 uses advanced cascade system - higher than standard LL values
Shadow Bias Settings Location: KVTweaks → Shadows tab Notes: Multiple bias controls (spot, deferred, terrain) - see Shadows tab for details
ShadowThrottleEnabled Default: true Notes: LL default - reduces shadow updates when FPS drops
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✨ REFLECTIONS (KVTweaks → Reflections)
Enable Reflection Probes Location: Preferences → Graphics → Advanced Notes: Must be enabled for KVTweaks reflection controls to function
Probe Intensity Default: 1.0 Range: 0.0-2.0+ Notes: S24 runtime control - reflection strength multiplier
Probe Blur LOD Bias Default: 0.0 Notes: Adjusts reflection blur/sharpness
Ambient Multiplier Default: 1.0 Range: 0.0-2.0+ Notes: S24 runtime control - ambient probe contribution
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎮 MOVEMENT (KVTweaks → Movement)
SmoothMovementEnable Default: Disabled (false) Notes: S24 feature - off by default, purely aesthetic enhancement
AccelerationTime Default: 0.2 seconds Notes: Time to reach full speed
DecelerationTime Default: 0.15 seconds Notes: Time to stop from full speed
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔬 SELECTION BEAM (Preferences → My Effects)
BeamStyle Default: 2 (Hybrid - Line + Glow) Options: 0=Particles Only, 1=Line Only, 2=Line+Glow (Lightsaber)
LineWidth Default: 3.0 pixels Range: 1.0-8.0 (driver may clamp)
CustomColor Default: Theme color from colors.xml Notes: Accessible via Preferences → My Effects (Selection Beam)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 PRO TIP
These settings are from the actual KVTweaks tabs and settings.xml. Many are dynamically managed by the viewer (VRAM, texture memory, thread counts). Start with defaults and adjust incrementally while monitoring FPS and system resources.

panel.label: 💻 S24 Console
panel.name: tab_console
panel.text_editor:
Command-line interface to the viewer. Access with Ctrl+Shift+4
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔍 OBJECT & AVATAR COMMANDS
find <text> Search for objects by name/description in your view Example: find chair
top List top 10 scripted objects (UNIX-style tool) Filters: scripts, sounds, complex Scopes: /p (parcel), /r (region), /o (owner) Example: top scripts /p
lookat <name> Point camera at avatar (partial name matching) Example: lookat john
beacon <name> Toggle tracking beacon on avatar Example: beacon john
scan Show all avatars in sim with distance and position
whois <name> Show detailed avatar information (UUID, display name, profile) Example: whois john
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚙️ SETTINGS MANAGEMENT
get <setting> Read current value of a debug setting Supports wildcard: get Render* Example: get RenderFarClip
set <setting> <value> Change a debug setting value Example: set RenderFarClip 256
reset <setting> Restore setting to default value Example: reset RenderFarClip
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌐 WEB & INFORMATION
motd Display Message of the Day with URL
web <url> Open URL in preferred browser (internal/external) Example: web https://secondlife.com
ver Show S24 version and build information
time Display current SL time and local time
uptime Show viewer session uptime
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🪟 FLOATER MANAGEMENT
floater <name> Toggle floater visibility Example: floater inventory
list floaters Show all available floater names
closeall Close all open floaters
open <floater> Open specific floater window Example: open preferences
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✈️ MOVEMENT & POSITIONING
tp <x> <y> <z> Teleport to local coordinates Example: tp 128 128 50
fly Toggle flight mode on/off
fly <altitude> Fly to absolute altitude (smooth autopilot movement) Example: fly 1000
fly <altitude> --fast Fly to altitude with turbo boost Example: fly 1000 --fast
fly down Descend to ground level (0.5m hover)
fly down --fast Fast descent to ground
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💬 CHAT & COMMUNICATION
say <message> Send message to local chat Example: say Hello World
shout <message> Send message with extended range (shout) Example: shout Can anyone hear me?
echo <text> Echo text back to console (testing/debugging) Example: echo test message
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🛠️ UTILITY COMMANDS
calc <expression> Evaluate mathematical expression Example: calc 2 + 2 * 3
uuid <text> Generate or validate UUID Example: uuid
clear Clear console history
quit Close the S24 Console window (exit/quit are aliases)
shutdown [seconds] Schedule viewer exit (IMMEDIATE if no delay) Example: shutdown 300 (exit in 5 minutes) ⚠️ WARNING: BRUTAL shutdown - experienced users only!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📖 HELP SYSTEM
help List all available commands
help <command> Show quick help for specific command Example: help top
<command> --help Show detailed documentation with examples Example: top --help
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 TIPS & BEST PRACTICES
• Commands are case-insensitive: GET, get, Get all work • Use ↑/↓ arrow keys to recall command history • Partial name matching: lookat foo finds "Foo Resident" • Unlimited range: scan and find work beyond draw distance • Beacon persistence: Beacons track moving avatars automatically • Wildcard search: Use * in get commands to find related settings
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔒 PRIVACY & SAFETY
• Help examples use privacy-safe placeholders (not real UUIDs) • TPV Policy compliant - respects LL's viewer boundaries • No remote execution - all commands are local to your viewer • No automated scanning - all actions require explicit commands

panel.label: 🔧 Troubleshooting
panel.name: tab_troubleshooting
panel.text_editor:
Common issues and solutions
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🖥️ LOW FPS / STUTTERING
Symptom: Viewer runs slowly or has periodic frame drops
Solutions: • Reduce RenderFarClip (draw distance) to 64-128m • Lower RenderVolumeLODFactor to 1.5 or 1.0 • Disable Advanced Lighting in Preferences if GPU-limited • Check shadow resolution scale - lower if needed • Use Performance Test Mode to isolate GPU vs CPU bottlenecks • Monitor texture memory - reduce if exceeding VRAM
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎨 WATER LOOKS WRONG
Symptom: Water appears too bright, too dark, or wrong color
Solutions: • Verify environment has proper water settings loaded • Disable Custom Tint if enabled in Water tab • Check Reflections: Reflection Probes must be enabled (Preferences → Graphics → Advanced) • Purge Shaders: Water shader changes may require cache purge + restart • Reset Water Metallic to 1.0 and Roughness Override to 0.0
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌑 SHADOW ACNE / LIGHT LEAKS
Symptom: Surfaces show speckled patterns or light bleeding through
Solutions: • Adjust Shadow Bias settings in Shadows tab • Check Resolution Scale - LL default is 3.0 • Increase Normal Offset slightly if acne persists • Try different shadow quality presets • Update GPU drivers - shadow artifacts often driver-related
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌳 MISSING TREES / GRASS
Symptom: Legacy Linden trees and grass not visible
Solutions: • Check render types: Advanced → Rendering → Types • Verify TREE and GRASS render types are enabled • Disable Performance Test Mode if active • Ensure pool skip isn't hiding vegetation (should be protected) • Region must support legacy vegetation objects
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🏃 SMOOTH MOVEMENT FEELS WRONG
Symptom: Movement feels sluggish or unresponsive after enabling
Solutions: • Reduce Acceleration Time from 0.2 to 0.1 seconds • Reduce Deceleration Time from 0.15 to 0.05 seconds • Disable feature if unnecessary - purely aesthetic • Feature is in Movement tab of KVTweaks
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💾 SETTINGS DON'T PERSIST
Symptom: KVTweaks settings reset after viewer restart
Solutions: • Ensure settings.xml is not read-only • Exit viewer properly (use Quit, not force-close) • Check file permissions in AppData folder • Most settings save immediately when changed
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💥 CRASHES AFTER CHANGES
Symptom: Viewer crashes or becomes unstable
Recovery Steps: 1. Start viewer with -noprobe flag (disables reflection probes) 2. Open KVTweaks → RESETS tab 3. Click Factory Reset 4. Click Purge All Caches 5. Restart normally 6. Re-enable settings gradually to isolate problem
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
☢️ NUCLEAR OPTION: COMPLETE RESET
When all else fails - return to absolute default state:
1. RESETS → Factory Reset (restores KVTweaks defaults) 2. RESETS → Purge All Caches (clears shader, texture, etc.) 3. Preferences → Graphics → Reset to Defaults 4. Restart viewer 5. Verify standard LL settings work before re-tweaking
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📝 STILL HAVING ISSUES?
Document before seeking help: • Screenshot each KVTweaks tab showing your settings • Note GPU model, RAM, driver version • Try updating GPU drivers first (most common fix) • Check viewer log for errors (Help → Report Bug → View Log)
Most rendering issues are GPU driver related!
